/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MyRendererDirect.dir/src/main_direct.c.o CMakeFiles/MyRendererDirect.dir/glad/src/glad.c.o -o MyRendererDirect  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit
